COMMITTED TO PRODUCING BOTH CLASSIC AND CONTEMPORARY WORKS, GIVING FULL VOICE TO A WIDE RANGE OF ARTISTS AND VISIONS
TO ADVANCE EDUCATIONAL EQUITY BY SUPPORTING STUDENTS FURTHEST FROM OPPORTUNITY AND TO DEVELOP DIVERSE LEADERS THROUGH NATIONAL SERVICE WHO CAN WORK ACROSS LINES OF DIFFERENCE

TO INSPIRE CURIOSITY ABOUT LIFE ON EARTH WHILE EXPLORING HOW THE WORLD CAME TO BE AND HOW WE CAN MAKE IT A BETER PLACE

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: TO PROVIDE COMPREHENSIVE, HOLISTIC AND COMMUNITY BASED SUPPORT SERVICES AND CARE FOR TERMINALLY ILL PERSONS, THEIR CAREGIVERS AND LOVED ONES W/O REGARD TO ECONOMIC STATUS, TO ENABLE THE DYING PERSON TO LIVE PEACEFULLY, IN COMFORT, AND WITH DIGNITY TO THE LAST MOMENT OF LIFE
TO CONNECT PEOPLE WITH NATURE BY PROVIDING A FREE, FAMILY-ORIENTED WILDLIFE EXPERIENCE IN THE HEART OF CHICAGO AND BY ADVANCING THE HIGHEST QUALITY OF ANIMAL CARE, EDUCATION, SCIENCE AND CONSERVATION

THROUGH THEATRE, WHICH INVITES, EVEN DEMANDS, INTERACTION WITH ITS AUDIENCE, OUR GOAL IS TO FIRE THE IMAGINATION WITH LOVE, TO CELEBRATE THE HUMAN CAPACITY TO TASTE AND SMELL, WEEP AND LAUGH, CREATE AND DESTROY, AND WAKE UP WHERE WE FIRST FELL-CHANGED, CHARGED AND EMPOWERED
COMBINES ACADEMIC SUPPORT, COMPETITIVE SQUASH AND ENRICHMENT OPPORTUNITIES TO EMPOWER STUDENTS TO REALIZE THEIR POTENTIAL AND MAKE THEIR MARK
TO INSPIRE, EDUCATE AND ENTERTAIN BY PRESENTING CURRENT AND IMPACTFUL DOCUMENTARIES THAT BUILD COMMUNITY AND PROPEL CHANGE

TO ENHANCE THE CULTURAL LIFE OF NORTH CAROLINA BY PRESENTING ARTISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT OPERA PRODUCTIONS OF THE HIGHEST QUALITY, STRENGTHENING AND EXPANDING AUDIENCES FOR OPERA IN THE REGION, AND PROVIDING REGIONAL ARTITS OPPORTUNITIES TO PARTICIPATE IN OPERATIC PRODUCTIONS AND EVENTS
COMMITTED TO EXCELLENT TEACHING, INNOVATIVE RESEARCH AND THE PERSONAL AND INTELLECTUAL GROWTH OF ITS STUDENTS IN A DIVERSE ACADEMIC COMMUNITY
SUPPLIES SMALLHOLDER FARMS WITH THE FINANCING AND TRAINING THEY NEED TO GROW MORE FOOD AND EARN MORE MONEY FROM THEIR FARMS
TRANSFORMS POSTSECONDARY ADVISING AND SUPPORT SO THAT EVERY STUDENT HAS THE POWER TO DEFINE THEIR OWN FUTURE
COMMITTED TO COMPASSIONATE, HIGH-QUALITY CARE THAT IMPROVES CHILDREN'S LIVES, IN A FAMILY-CENTERED AND COLLABORATIVE ENVIRONMENT
FOR RELIGIOUS EDUCATION PROGRAMS

WORKING WITH CORPORATE AND COMMUNITY PARTNERS TO MEET CRITICAL NEEDS OF FAMILIES BY ADDRESSING FOOD INSECURITIES IN UNDERSERVED POPULATIONS AND FACILITATING OPPORTUNITIES FOR YOUNG PEOPLE TO PURSUE THEIR DREAMS THROUGH ARTS AND ENTERTAINMENT TRAINING PROGRAMMING, AND SUPPORT ATLANTA'S UNHOUSED COMMUNITY THROUGH CLOTHING DRIVES AND TOILETRY ITEM DONATIONS
